revision.text:
<includeonly>__NONEWSECTIONLINK__</includeonly>{{AfC submission/{{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}
  |{{#switch:{{ucfirst:{{{1|}}}}}
   |R        = reviewing
   |D        = {{#if:{{{reject|}}}|rejected|declined}}
   |T        = draft
   |#default = pending
  }}
  |{{#if:{{#ifeq:{{REVISIONID}}|{{REVISIONID:{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}|0|}}{{#ifeq:{{ucfirst:{{{1|}}}}}|D||0}}
   |{{#ifeq:{{{ns}}}|0
    |misplaced
    |created
   }}
   |declined
  }}
 }}
 |submit={{{ts|}}}
 |author={{{a|}}}
 |user={{{u|}}}
 |reason={{{2|}}}
 |details={{{3|{{{details|}}}}}}
 |reason2={{{reason2|}}}
 |details2={{{details2|}}}
 |small={{{small|}}}
 |decliner={{{decliner|}}}
 |declinets={{{declinets|}}}
 |ts={{{ts|}}}
 |type={{{type}}}
 |1={{{2|}}}
 |2={{{3|}}}
 |demo={{{demo|}}}
}}<includeonly>{{#if:{{{demo|}}}|| {{#ifeq:{{ucfirst:{{{1|}}}}}|T|| [[Category:{{AfC date category|ts={{{ts|}}}}}|{{SUBPAGENAME}}]]
{{#invoke:AfC submission catcheck|checkforcats}} }}}}<!--IP tracking-->{{#switch: {{IsIPAddress|{{{u}}}}}|4|6={{#switch:{{ucfirst:{{{1|}}}}}
   |R        = 
   |D        = {{#if:{{{reject|}}}|[[Category:Rejected draft pages submitted for review by an IP]]|[[Category:Declined draft pages submitted for review by an IP]]}}
   |T        = [[Category:Unsubmitted draft pages created by an IP]]
   |#default = [[Category:Draft pages submitted for review by an IP]]
  }}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>__NOINDEX__

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]

<includeonly>__NONEWSECTIONLINK__</includeonly>{{AfC submission/{{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}
  |{{#switch:{{ucfirst:{{{1|}}}}}
   |R        = reviewing
   |D        = {{#if:{{{reject|}}}|rejected|declined}}
   |T        = draft
   |#default = pending
  }}
  |{{#if:{{#ifeq:{{REVISIONID}}|{{REVISIONID:{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}|0|}}{{#ifeq:{{ucfirst:{{{1|}}}}}|D||0}}
   |{{#ifeq:{{{ns}}}|0
    |misplaced
    |created
   }}
   |declined
  }}
 }}

 |user={{{u|}}}

   |T        = [[Category:Unsubmitted draft pages created by an IP]]

  }}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was this is used in a few pages but not good for them
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23124421395|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=AfC_submission here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]

Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
